description: A slogan graphic in vertical (portrait) format. The photographic background shows the interior of a large industrial warehouse or factory floor with exposed steel roof trusses, rows of overhead lights, support columns, and scattered equipment, in desaturated near-black-and-white tones. The one area of full color is a large American flag hanging vertically from a ceiling truss in the center of the frame. Centered across the lower-middle in a white serif capital font is the slogan 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST'. No agency seal is visible on the image.
